description: Google Cloud Healthcare API is a managed Google Cloud service for storing, transforming, and accessing healthcare data such as FHIR, HL7v2, DICOM, consent, and de-identification resources. It organizes data into projects, locations, datasets, and modality-specific stores for healthcare interoperability workflows.
summary: healthcare.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Healthcare REST API at `https://healthcare.googleapis.com/v1` plus a `gcloud healthcare` CLI surface; both use Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens.
